summary: Created the first viable organism and observer bootstrap.
Adopted self-describing cells and bounded orientation packets so agent comprehension scales with local dependencies rather than repository size.
Implemented trusted static policy inspection, conditional adversarial review, networkless candidate validation, automatic merge arming, and a six-scenario local admission lab.

Bound adversarial review approvals to the exact head commit, classified rename sources to close red-zone evasion, extended red-zone protection to .github and gate-defining docs, aligned CODEOWNERS with policy, corrected doc claims, and digest-pinned execution images.
Created a reusable project-level visual identity seed with light and dark logos, diagrams, badges, social assets, machine-readable discovery, and explicit autonomous-agent provenance.
